refined_caption: The hospital food storage area appears to be contaminated with food items scattered around. The area looks unhygienic.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital food storage area, it was filled with food items and looked extremely unhygienic. As a patient, it's concerning to think that the food being served to us may be contaminated. I hope the hospital takes immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: The food storage area in the hospital is really dirty and has food all over the place, it's pretty gross.
